# novu_fcm_integration (Resource)

FCM Integration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "novu_fcm_integration" "example1" {
  name       = "example fcm integration 1"
  identifier = "example fcm integration 1"
  active     = true
  check      = true
  service_account = {
    type                        = "service_account"
    project_id                  = "example-id"
    private_key_id              = "1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef"
    private_key                 = "-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- \n 1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef \n -----END PRIVATE KEY-----"
    client_email                = "example@example.com"
    client_id                   = "123456"
    auth_uri                    = "https://example.com/auth"
    token_uri                   = "https://example.com/token"
    auth_provider_x509_cert_url = "https://example.com/auth-provider-x509-cert-url"
    client_x509_cert_url        = "https://example.com/client-x509-cert-url"
  }
}

# Alternatively, use the json_configuration : 
locals {
  fcm_json_string = "{\"example\" : \"example\"}"
}

resource "novu_fcm_integration" "example2" {
  name               = "example fcm integration 2"
  identifier         = "example fcm integration 2"
  active             = true
  check              = true
  json_configuration = local.fcm_json_string
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the integration is active
- `check` (Boolean) Whether the integration is checked. It is recommended to set this to true.
- `identifier` (String) Identifier of the integration
- `json_configuration` (String) JSON configuration of the integration
- `name` (String) Name of the integration
- `service_account` (Attributes) FCM service account (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--service_account))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the integration

<a id="nestedatt--service_account"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_account`

Required:

- `auth_provider_x509_cert_url` (String) Auth provider X509 cert URL of the service account
- `auth_uri` (String) Auth URI of the service account
- `client_email` (String) Client email of the service account
- `client_id` (String) Client ID of the service account
- `client_x509_cert_url` (String) Client X509 cert URL of the service account
- `private_key` (String) Private key of the service account
- `private_key_id` (String) Private key ID of the service account
- `project_id` (String) Project ID of the service account
- `token_uri` (String) Token URI of the service account
- `type` (String) Type of the service account

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an FCM integration by its identifier
terraform import novu_fcm_integration.example <identifier>
```
